metadata.title: Quick 2v1 Hold on B Site with Clean Headshots in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how smart positioning and timing helped secure two quick kills on B site. What’s your favorite way to play tight angles in VALORANT?
Drop your best clutch moments in the comments!
